raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad ẜazzija Rutte ta Mo-
abiteu Seewa us Naëmju : Lai
es jelle Tihrumâ eemu / tad las-
fischu es Wahrpas pakkatto/ kur-
ra Azzis es Schehlastibu atrad-
dischu / un ta ẜazzija us winnu :
Eij manna Metta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad gahje winnu/un nah-
ze/ un uslaſſija Tihrumâ teem
Pfahwejeem pakkat. Un tas itt
patt notikkahs/ ka tas pats Tih-
rums Boafam peederreja/ kas no
Elimeleka Raddeem bija.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un redsi/ Boas nahze no
Betlemes / un ẜazzija us teem
Pfahwejeem: Lai tas KUNGS
juins palihds/ un tee ẜazzija us
winnu : Lai tas KUNGS tew
twehti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad ẜazzija Boas us sawu
Puifs/ kas pahr teem Pfahwe-
jeem bija zelts: kas ta tahda jan-
na Seewa?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Puifs/ kas pahr
teem Pfahwejeem bija zelts / at-
bildeja un ẜazzija : Schi irr ta
jauna Moabiteu Seewa/ kas ar
Naëmju irr atgreesufees no Mo-
aba Semmes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ta ẜazzija: Lai es jelle
uslaſſu/ un to Kuhlischn Starpâ
(Wahrpas) krahju teem Pfah-
wejeem pakkat/ ta irr winna nah-
kusi un stahwejsi agri no Rihta
lihdſchun Laikam/ un nu winna
dauds Mahjas ne paleek.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad ẜazzija Boas us Rut-
teg : Ar tu dsirði manna Metta/
ne eij tu Zitta Tihrumâ laſſiht /
tew arrı ne buhs no ſchennenes
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tawas Azzis lai ranga ue
to Tihrumu/ fo tee pkaufs / un
tu staiga teem pakkat/ es arri ef-
mu teem Puifscheim pawehlejs
ka tewi ne weenain buhs niſkahrt/
un kad tew flahpst/ tad eij pe-
teein Trankeem / un dserr no ta-
fo tee Puifchi buhs finehlnschi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad wettechs winna us fa-
wu Waigu / un klannijahs pe-
Semmes/ un ẜazzija us winnu:
Rapehz esimu es Schehlastibu at-
raddusi tawâs Azzis/ ka tu mai-
pasihsti / fur es tomebr fiveſch-
esmu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad atbildeja Boas/ un
ẜazzija us winnu : Man irr stah-
stihts wife/ fo tu pee tawas Mah-
tizes efi darrijsti pehz tawa Wiḫ-
ra Mirschanas/ un efi tawu Teh-
wu/ un tawu Mahti/ un tawu
Dsintas-Semmi atstahjufi / un
gahjusi pee Laudim / fo tu pa-
preefschu ne pasinnt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Lai tas KUNGS tew ta-
wu Darbu atmakfa/ un tawa Al-
ga lai pilniga irr no ta KUNG-
Israëta Deewa/ appakſch kurra-
Spahrneem tu efi nahkusi Gel-
beschannu dabbuht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un winna ẜazzija: Lai es
Schehlastibu atrohmnu tawas Az-
zis mans Kungs/ jo tu efi inaut-
eeprezinajs / un tawu Kalpon-
imhligt usrunnajs/ jepſchu es n-
efinu itt ka weena no tawahu
Kalponehm.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Boas ẜazzija us win-
nu
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
